description: Unknown client, no identifying UA, no Claude Code signals, no Anthropic/OpenAI body markers. Classifier falls through to RouteClass.GENERIC with the most conservative Policy. Exercises the minimum-viable telemetry emission path.

test_env_preconditions.reason: Classifier's Signal-5 (env markers) treats CLAUDECODE=1 as a Claude Code indicator even when no HTTP signals are present. SC-06 fixtures must scrub these env vars before running this scenario.
